+def summarize(df):

+    vals = daily_ic(df)

+    if not vals:

+        return {"ic_mean": 0.0, "rank_ic_mean": 0.0, "icir": 0.0, "total_days": 0}

+    ic = np.array([x[1] for x in vals], dtype=float)

+    ric = np.array([x[2] for x in vals], dtype=float)

+    return {

+        "ic_mean": float(ic.mean()),

+        "rank_ic_mean": float(ric.mean()),

+        "icir": float(ic.mean() / ic.std()) if ic.std() > 1e-12 else 0.0,

+        "total_days": int(len(vals)),

+    }
